title: ConformanceCase
description: Shape of a single declarative test case under `spec/conformance/cases/<id>.json`. Consumed by language-neutral conformance runners. See `spec/conformance/README.md` for the runner contract.

$schema.description: Optional IDE hint. Implementations MUST ignore this field.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. MUST equal the filename stem (`cases/<id>.json`).

description.description: One-to-three-sentence human-readable explanation of what the case verifies.

fixture.description: Folder name under `conformance/fixtures/` used as the scope root. Omit for cases that do not need a corpus (e.g. `kernel-empty-boot`).

sub.description: Subcommand for verbs that have them (e.g. `submit` for `job submit`).

flags.description: Flags. Implementations MUST accept them in any order; ordering here is cosmetic.

assertions.description: Ordered list of assertions. A case passes iff every assertion passes.

Assertion.description: Discriminated union. The `type` field selects the assertion shape.

value.description: Exit code the invocation MUST return.

path.description: JSONPath expression (RFC 9535 subset) evaluated against parsed stdout.

equals.description: Any JSON value. The extracted value MUST deep-equal this.

matches.description: ECMAScript regex. The extracted value (coerced to string) MUST match.

path.description: Relative to the scope root. Glob patterns permitted; at least one match MUST exist.
Relative to the scope root. Glob permitted; MUST resolve to exactly one file.

fixture.description: Path under `conformance/fixtures/` whose bytes MUST appear verbatim in the target file.

path.description: Relative to the scope root. Glob permitted; MUST resolve to exactly one file. File MUST parse as JSON.

schema.description: Path under `schemas/` that the file MUST validate against.

pattern.description: ECMAScript regex. The full stderr output MUST match at least once.
